opinion.h: CEPERO v. RINCON DE GAUTIER, 368 U.S. 9 (1961)
CEPERO v. RINCON DE GAUTIER, CITY MANAGER, SAN JUAN. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK. No. 108, Misc. Decided October 9, 1961.
opinion.p: 368 U.S. 9 CEPERO v. PUERTO RICO ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK. No. 164, Misc. Decided October 9, 1961.
